content_body: Mountain View Marina proudly features a wide variety of boat rentals on beautiful Lake Hiwassee in Murphy, NC. Whether you are planning an afternoon of fun in the sun or an exciting family vacation, we have the watercraft and friendly staff to meet your needs. Our Tritoon Boats can be configured for fishing, skiing, swimming, tubing, wakeboarding, or sightseeing with 115-250hp Yamaha engines.
title: Mountain View Marina
